perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with two women walking into a restaurant called 'JIN.HER'. (2) Inside, a waiter in a white shirt and black suspenders presents a menu. The restaurant has a large decorative hot air balloon and dried floral arrangements. (3) The women are seated at a table and begin trying various durian-themed dishes. First is a white layered drink with a lime slice. They stir it and take sips. (4) Next is a coffee-layered drink (durian latte). A close-up shows thick durian flesh being sucked up through a straw. (5) They eat a pizza topped with what looks like durian and small snacks. (6) A large souffle pancake is served with cream and durian fruit on the side. Liquid sauce is poured over it. (7) The women react with mixed expressions of intensity and enjoyment while eating. (8) The video ends with a shot of the menu showing the 'Season of the King' durian items.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic/pop background music plays continuously throughout. (2) Two female voices are heard conversing in Mandarin, discussing the food's texture and flavor. They describe the coconut taste and the strong durian presence. (3) Ambient restaurant noise is minimal, with clear vocal focus. (4) Sounds of sipping through a straw and light clinking of cutlery are heard occasionally. (5) The music remains upbeat until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'JIN.HER 今鶴' - Functional: Restaurant name. (2) '榴槤椰果凍飲' - Functional: Durian Coconut Jelly Drink. (3) '不黏 / 很像椰奶' - Functional: Not sticky / very like coconut milk. (4) '很東南亞的味道' - Functional: Very Southeast Asian flavor. (5) '榴槤拿鐵' - Functional: Durian Latte. (6) '榴槤果肉' - Functional: Durian flesh. (7) '榴槤乖乖PIZZA' - Functional: Durian Pizza. (8) '榴槤望返舒芙蕾' - Functional: Durian Souffle Pancake. (9) '讚賞!! 好吃到太驚艷' - Decorative: Praise!! So delicious it's stunning.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at entrance -> Menu reveal -> Sequential tasting of four different durian dishes -> Summary/Outro.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female influencers, 1 waiter (torso/hands), and approximately 2 background female passers-by at the entrance.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair wearing a black crop top and grey trousers. The second woman has long wavy dark hair wearing a green dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern restaurant interior with a minimalist white facade, decorative hot air balloons, dried plants, and comfortable orange booths.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the new seasonal durian menu at the 'JIN.HER' restaurant by showcasing various creative durian-based dishes and drinks and providing a positive review of their taste and texture.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of restaurant logo, menu card, and specific dishes with positive commentary.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style text overlays and expressive facial reactions to 'strong' flavors.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets foodies interested in unconventional flavors, specifically the 'King of Fruits' (durian).
